channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: First gray wolf in Sequoia National Park spotted after more than 100 years
item.description: The female wolf has traveled hundreds of miles across California in the past few months, the California Wolf Watch said.

item.title: Xi and Putin meet to reaffirm China-Russia ties days after Trump's visit
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin have hailed their strategic ties and energy trade during a meeting in Beijing

item.title: WHO says Ebola risks high for region, but not a pandemic emergency
item.description: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says risks from the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda are high at national and regional levels, and low at global level.

item.title: The major cases the Supreme Court will decide in the coming weeks
item.description: The Supreme Court's term ends around late June, with rulings expected on birthright citizenship, transgender athlete bans, and gun rights.
